name: nice-on-success
description: Plays a nice sound when tests or builds succeed.

niceOnSuccess.successSoundPath.description: Absolute path to the custom .wav file to play on success.

niceOnSuccess.failureSoundPath.description: Absolute path to the custom .wav file to play on failure.

niceOnSuccess.enabledTasks.description: Array of task names to play sounds for. Leave empty to play sounds for all tasks. Example: ["npm: test", "npm: build"]

niceOnSuccess.enableTerminalListener.description: Enable sounds for terminal commands (requires VS Code 1.89.0+). Disable to only play sounds for tasks.

niceOnSuccess.enabledTerminalCommands.description: Array of terminal commands to play sounds for (e.g. ["npm", "build"]). Only used when enableTerminalListener is true. Leave empty to play sounds for all commands.
